## Cross-task patterns

- **RAG replaces filesystem search**: in 3/4 big-swing tasks, B used RAG instead of Glob/Grep (smoking-gun mechanism for plugin underperformance).
- **Fewer Reads under B**: in 4/4 big-swing tasks, B made <½ as many Read calls as A.
